seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Recursively self-improving autonomous AI agents using tiered LLMs (Deepseek/Kimi for easy, Sonnet/Grok for medium, Opus/Sol for hard, Fable for coding) that run on schedule/trigger to automate work; goal is employees monitoring role-specific agents.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Demonstrates advanced SVG generation capabilities with harder variations like 'pelican on bicycle chasing through Backrooms' as basic prompts saturate.
near_misses.reason: Visual demo of model capability but not a new framework/repo or actionable technical update.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Advice on using Rules, Sandbox, Approve mode & Hooks instead of full-access to prevent rare file deletion issues in agents like GPT-5.6/Codex.
near_misses.reason: Practical safety tip for agent use but not an innovation or new tool release.

notes: Seed search yielded one strong agent-related post from bindureddy; global search with broad terms returned mostly low-signal or unrelated content in the past 24h. No new open-source repos or major architecture breakthroughs surfaced.
